creator: mharo@area51.fremont.ca.us
text:
Update of port.  

portlint fine.  Compiles fine.  No added or removed patch files.

This port had some stuff in the makefile about SSL, but the 
export version of this port didn't include any SSL stuff.

I'm not exactly sure what this port does, but I figured that if
someone who uses it saw the update, they could help test it out
and let us know if the changes work.
